scenes.description: List of distinct scenes identified in the video chunk, in chronological order.

scene_number.description: Sequential scene number within this chunk, starting from 1.

start_time.description: Timestamp when the scene begins, in HH:MM:SS.mmm format.

end_time.description: Timestamp when the scene ends, in HH:MM:SS.mmm format.

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the scene in seconds.

summary.description: Brief one-line summary of what happens in this scene.

detailed_description.description: Detailed narrative description of the scene's events, actions, and context.

people.description: All people visible or identifiable in the scene.

label.description: Identifier for this person (e.g. 'Person A', 'Speaker 1', or a name if identifiable from context).

appearance.description: Physical description: clothing, hair, distinguishing features.

actions.description: What this person is doing in the scene.

position_in_frame.description: Where the person appears in the frame (e.g. 'center', 'left foreground', 'background right').

emotions.description: Observed emotional state or facial expressions (e.g. 'smiling', 'tense', 'neutral').

interactions.description: Interactions between people in the scene.

participants.description: Labels of people involved in this interaction.

dialogue.description: Spoken words, narration, or voiceover in the scene.

timestamp.description: Approximate timestamp of the utterance in HH:MM:SS format.

text.description: The spoken words, transcribed as accurately as possible.

angle.description: Camera angle (e.g. 'eye level', 'low angle', 'high angle', 'dutch angle', 'bird's eye').

movement.description: Camera movement (e.g. 'static', 'pan left', 'tilt up', 'tracking', 'dolly in', 'handheld', 'zoom in', 'crane').

focus.description: What the camera is focused on or drawing attention to.

mood.description: Overall mood and atmosphere of the scene.

atmosphere.description: Description of the overall atmosphere and feeling conveyed.

location.description: Where the scene takes place (e.g. 'office interior', 'city street', 'beach').

weather.description: Weather conditions if outdoors or visible (e.g. 'clear', 'overcast', 'raining', 'N/A').

music.description: Background music description (genre, mood, intensity) or 'none'.

sound_effects.description: Notable sound effects or ambient sounds.

on_screen_text.description: Any text visible on screen (titles, subtitles, signs, graphics, lower thirds).

type.description: Type of text (e.g. 'title card', 'subtitle', 'sign', 'graphic overlay', 'lower third', 'watermark').

visual_style.description: Notable visual style elements: color grading, filters, aspect ratio changes, special effects.

scene_transition.description: How this scene transitions to the next (e.g. 'hard cut', 'fade to black', 'dissolve', 'wipe', 'match cut', 'N/A').

chunk_summary.description: High-level summary of this entire video chunk.

total_scenes.description: Total number of distinct scenes identified in this chunk.

notable_observations.description: Any notable patterns, recurring motifs, continuity notes, or editorial observations.
